# calendarChooserSelectionDidChange(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sent when a user changes the selection.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func calendarChooserSelectionDidChange(_ calendarChooser: EKCalendarChooser)
```

## Parameters

- **calendarChooser**: The calendar chooser that sent this message.

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.eventkitui/documentation/EventKitUI/EKCalendarChooser/selectedCalendars] property to get the current selection.

## Selecting Calendars

- **calendarChooserDidFinish(_:)**: Sent when a user selects one or more calendars.
- **calendarChooserDidCancel(_:)**: Sent when the user cancels a calendar selection.
